data.name: BDSM Sex
data.detailed_description:
An adult visual novel about a young woman who learns submission, pushes her boundaries, and discovers new pleasures under her Master’s control.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Annalise steps into the dungeon with a single desire: to fill the emptiness in her life and finally experience the pleasure she’s been denied for so long.

Her Master agrees to guide her though this journey of exploration, but only under the promise she’ll do anything he asks of her.

Step by step, he teaches her patience, obedience, and the true depths of surrender.

He introduces her to his tools of discipline, testing her limits and showing her the thrill of giving herself completely.

Dive into 16 episodes of power play, featuring over high-quality renders, steamy dialogue,  and captivating animations.

FEATURES:  

- 500+ renders
- 30+ animations 
- Long story (aprox 4 hours), divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 12.0
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
